name: Scotch Teas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until the butter melts.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the oats, baking powder, and salt. Mix well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes. Note that the cookies may not appear set while cooking but will harden upon cooling.
5. Allow to cool completely, then cut into bars.
Makes 24 bars.
